description: NAVAID remark data from the FAA NASR 28-day subscription. Contains free-form remarks associated with NAVAID records.

EFF_DATE.description: The 28 Day NASR Subscription Effective Date (YYYY/MM/DD).

NAV_ID.description: NAVAID Facility Identifier (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

NAV_TYPE.description: NAVAID Facility Type (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

STATE_CODE.description: Associated State Post Office Code (common column).

CITY.description: Associated City Name (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

COUNTRY_CODE.description: Country Post Office Code (key column for joining to NAV_BASE).

REF_COL_NAME.description: NASR column name associated with remark. Non-specific remarks are identified as such.

REF_COL_SEQ_NO.description: Sequence number assigned to reference column remark.

REMARK.description: Remark text (free form text that further describes a specific information item).
